zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael於大約1073年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾時，他的父親Ralph de Gaël II36歲，母親Emma de Breteuil21歲。他和Havoise de Hédé et Montauban至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1143年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael于大约1073年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾时，他的父亲Ralph de Gaël II36岁，母亲Emma de Breteuil21岁。他和Havoise de Hédé et Montauban至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1143年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael was born about 1073, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Ralph de Gaël II, was 36 and his mother, Emma de Breteuil, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. He died about 1143, in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael est né environ 1073, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Ralph de Gaël II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma de Breteuil, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Il est décédé environ 1143, à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael um 1073 in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Gaël II 36 und seine Mutter Emma de Breteuil 21. Er hatte mit Havoise de Hédé et Montauban mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1143 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael è nato il circa 1073 nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph de Gaël II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Breteuil, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Morì circa 1143, nel Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Raoul de Montfort Gaelが約1073年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Gaël IIは36歳，母Emma de Breteuilは21歳であった。彼はHavoise de Hédé et Montaubanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1143年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael(이)가 대략 1073년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Gaël II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Breteuil(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Havoise de Hédé et Montauban(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1143년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1073–about 1143: tany ho any amin'ny 1073–tany ho any amin'ny 1143

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael nasceu aproximadamente 1073, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ralph de Gaël II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Breteuil, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1143, em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael родился около 1073 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph de Gaël II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Breteuil, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Он умер около 1143 г. в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.about 1073–about 1143: e tusa o le 1073–e tusa o le 1143

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael nació aproximadamente 1073, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ralph de Gaël II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma de Breteuil, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Murió aproximadamente 1143, en Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
